message:
feat(ftui): stripe and selection styling for virtualized result items (2noh9.3.4)

Add stripe_style and agent_style fields to ResultItem so each row
renders with alternating background tints (even/odd) and selected
items use the agent accent style. RenderItem::render() now applies
base_style via Paragraph for proper theme-aware rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
